creator: eugen@freebsd.org
text:
Bridge places its ports to promiscuous mode and attached ifconfig output shows PROMISC flag. In this mode, ixl interfaces should "see" all incoming frames despite of multicast filters.

This may be a bug in the ixl(4) driver.  Michael, please try to remove one of your ixl interfaces from the bridge and run "tcpdump -ni ixl0" to check if it shows incoming STP BPDU that way.
